comments.author: @WorldDiscoveries11
comments.text: This looks like such an amazing place to live. The landscapes feel so raw and wild, but at the same time really calm and relaxing. The way the story shows daily life there makes it even more interesting.

replies.author: @BestTravel2
replies.text: I'm glad you enjoyed the video and got a sense of what life is like here! It truly is a unique blend of wild beauty and peaceful living.
